compiled_state.title: EV-2: remove dead/internal vars + self-resolve subprocess handoffs
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart
compiled_state.description:
## What
Remove: PROJECT_ROOT (config.py + ~23 sites; REBAR_ROOT only), TICKET_CMD (dead validate.py branch), _REBAR_GC_AUTO_ZERO (dead event_append.py flag), TICKET_SYNC_CMD (dead shell=True ticket-sync; replace sync-before-compact with a direct in-process pull or drop). Param-ify REBAR_FSCK_NO_MUTATE (read paths pass no_mutate=True; delete os.environ set/pop). Self-resolve in subprocesses + delete: REBAR_TICKET_CLI, TICKET_WORDLIST_PATH (engine_env handoffs -> call in_process_cli()/wordlist_path() directly).

## Files
config.py, _engine_support/validate.py, _store/event_append.py, _commands/compact.py, _commands/fsck.py, __init__.py, _engine.py, _engine/rebar_reconciler/{applier,reconcile,invariants}.py, reducer/_alias.py

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] All listed vars removed; subprocess handoffs self-resolve
- [ ] fsck read-paths use the no_mutate param (no env mutation); CLI fsck still mutates
- [ ] sync-before-compact is a direct in-process pull or removed (no shell=True)
- [ ] Full suite green

comments.body: DECOMPOSED (config-loop, 2026-06-16, user-authorized). EV-2 bundled 6 removals across ~11 files + 2 test-suite migrations — too large for one rigorous pass. Split into 3 concrete, independently-shippable, non-breaking sub-tickets (each blocks 77aa; discovered_from 77aa): EV-2c [38c7] dead internal flags + subprocess self-resolve (_REBAR_GC_AUTO_ZERO, TICKET_SYNC_CMD, REBAR_FSCK_NO_MUTATE param-ify, REBAR_TICKET_CLI, TICKET_WORDLIST_PATH) -> DONE (commit ca39db45); EV-2a [dab5] remove PROJECT_ROOT (REBAR_ROOT only) across ~23 src reads + ~14 test files -> OPEN; EV-2b [096c] remove TICKET_CMD validate injection seam + materialize validate tests in-process -> OPEN. 77aa closes when EV-2a + EV-2b land. Rationale: PROJECT_ROOT and TICKET_CMD each carry their own test migration, so each warrants its own validated iteration.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: COMPLETE via decomposition (config-loop). All three sub-tickets closed: EV-2c [38c7] dead internal flags + subprocess self-resolve (commit ca39db45); EV-2a [dab5] PROJECT_ROOT removal (commit b584f267); EV-2b [096c] TICKET_CMD validate seam removal (commit f2a74bad). Net effect: removed 7 dead/internal/duplicate env vars (_REBAR_GC_AUTO_ZERO, TICKET_SYNC_CMD, REBAR_FSCK_NO_MUTATE [param-ified], REBAR_TICKET_CLI, TICKET_WORDLIST_PATH, PROJECT_ROOT, TICKET_CMD); subprocess handoffs self-resolve via in_process_cli()/wordlist_path(); fsck read-paths use the no_mutate param (no os.environ round-trip); sync-before-compact is a direct in-process pull (no shell=True). All EV-2 ACs met. Full offline suite green (1931) on each slice. Verify gate fail-closed preserved throughout.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
